hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(env|secret)|http-client\.env'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Sensitive file — do not edit credentials or env files"}'; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE 'frontend/.*\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then cd frontend && npx eslint --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null; fi; } || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -q '\.java$' && cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ./gradlew compileJava -q 2>&1 | grep -E 'ERROR|WARN' | head -5 || true

hooks.statusMessage: Letting language server catch up to prevent stale diagnostics
